author: Luhui Dev
description: Upload images referenced in the current note to Aliyun OSS, compress them first, and rewrite the links in place. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Luhui Dev
manifest.description: Upload images referenced in the current note to Aliyun OSS, compress them first, and rewrite the links in place.
manifest.name: NotePic OSS

name: NotePic OSS

releases.author: Luhui-Dev
releases.description:
## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then place them in:

```text
<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/notepic-oss/
```

The tag name must match `manifest.json.version` for Obsidian community plugin releases.


## What's Changed
* feat: add local image asset cleanup by @Luhui-Dev in https://github.com/Luhui-Dev/NotePic-OSS-Obsidian/pull/5


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Luhui-Dev/NotePic-OSS-Obsidian/compare/1.1.3...1.2.0
releases.name: NotePic-OSS-Obsidian v1.2.0
